subject: A grand white-stone memorial hall: a long colonnade of tall fluted columns flanking a processional walkway, opening toward an ornately carved facade with statue niches and a vaulted sky overhead.
description: A vast classical-fantasy memorial hall rendered in cream and pale gold stone. Two rows of tall fluted columns recede in single-point perspective down a wide stone-paved colonnade, drawing the eye toward an ornately carved end-wall with statue niches, decorative friezes, and arched openings. The columns are crowned with capitals and an elaborate cornice. Above the columns the hall is open to a soft blue sky with wispy pale clouds. Light is bright and diffuse, washing the stonework in warm highlights and casting long, gentle shadows along the ground. No figures, animals, or active characters are present — the architecture itself is the subject, monumental and reverent.
foreground: stone-paved processional walkway flanked by the bases of tall fluted columns
background: ornately carved end-wall with statue niches and arched openings beneath an open blue sky
